_meta.author: aghasisahakyan1
_meta.title: Multimodal AI Chat Input
_meta.description: A versatile React component for creating AI chat interfaces. Supports text input and file attachments (images, videos, audio, PDF, etc.) with interactive previews. Includes integrated send and stop buttons, automatic textarea resizing, and optional suggested actions for new conversations. Built using modern hooks and Tailwind CSS for easy styling
